title: How a Top Podcaster Rides the AI Wave - Ep. 28 with Nathaniel Whittemore
title_zh: 顶级播客制作人如何驾驭AI浪潮-第28集与Nathaniel Whittemore
full_text: Keeping up with AI is Nathaniel Whittemore’s full-time job—and I spent an hour with him to understand how he does it. Nathaniel is the host of a top-ranked AI podcast on the technology charts, The AI Daily Brief, which breaks down the most important news in AI every day. He is also the founder and CEO of Superintelligent, a platform that teaches you how to use AI for work and fun through interactive video tutorials. We talked about how he curates information with X bookmarks, Google News, news

## clean_text

Keeping up with AI is Nathaniel Whittemore’s full-time job—and I spent an hour with him to understand how he does it. Nathaniel is the host of a top-ranked AI podcast on the technology charts, The AI Daily Brief, which breaks down the most important news in AI every day. He is also the founder and CEO of Superintelligent, a platform that teaches you how to use AI for work and fun through interactive video tutorials. We talked about how he curates information with X bookmarks, Google News, news
